exact_definition: YoY growth in EIA U.S. crude-oil production.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Weather, maintenance, regulation, capital discipline, geology.
data_quality_limitations: Domestic production is not global supply and monthly values are revised.

exact_definition: YoY growth in U.S. petroleum consumption excluding biofuels.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Efficiency, substitution, weather, structural change.
data_quality_limitations: Consumption is an energy-content aggregate and is revised.

exact_definition: Monthly petroleum consumption divided by BEA population.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Efficiency, demographics, travel patterns, electrification.
data_quality_limitations: Monthly population is estimated; aggregate petroleum includes non-transport uses.

exact_definition: Average monthly U.S. commercial crude stocks excluding SPR.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Imports, refinery runs, exports, pipeline timing.
data_quality_limitations: U.S.-only and monthly averaging hides weekly extremes.

exact_definition: Current inventory minus the prior five-year same-month mean.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Changing storage capacity, exports, SPR policy, seasonality shifts.
data_quality_limitations: Five observations define each seasonal norm; not a global balance.

exact_definition: Comparative inventory divided by the prior five-year same-month standard deviation.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Same alternatives as comparative inventory.
data_quality_limitations: Small seasonal reference sample can produce unstable z-scores.

exact_definition: Monthly average of weekly U.S. operable refinery capacity utilization.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Planned maintenance, hurricanes, outages, product demand.
data_quality_limitations: High utilization can reflect strong demand rather than scarcity.

exact_definition: Global immediately available crude production capacity above current output.
date_coverage: Populated from the source cache when implemented
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Quota policy, sanctions, quality mismatch.
data_quality_limitations: Definitions are model-based, revised, and not consistently available without licensed sources.

exact_definition: Second-minus-front or 12-month-minus-front WTI futures price.
date_coverage: Populated from the source cache when implemented
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Interest, storage, hedging pressure, contract-specific flows.
data_quality_limitations: A clean redistributable continuous curve is not yet in the cache.

exact_definition: WTI monthly price divided by CPI-U / 100.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Dollar moves, geopolitics, financial positioning.
data_quality_limitations: CPI is a broad deflator and monthly WTI averaging hides peaks.

exact_definition: Nominal PCE energy goods and services divided by disposable personal income.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Weather, efficiency, regulated utility prices, income transfers.
data_quality_limitations: Aggregate share masks household distribution and both inputs are revised.

exact_definition: Nominal PCE energy goods and services divided by nominal GDP.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Economic composition, weather, efficiency, trade exposure.
data_quality_limitations: Quarterly GDP is carried within quarter and is not release-vintage safe.

exact_definition: CPI-U energy index and its YoY growth.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Utility regulation, taxes, refining margins, weather.
data_quality_limitations: Volatile basket; weights and seasonal factors can change.

exact_definition: Inflation-adjusted aggregate disposable personal income and YoY growth.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Fiscal transfers, taxes, wages, non-energy inflation.
data_quality_limitations: Aggregate measure masks distribution and is revised.

exact_definition: Effective federal funds rate.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Monetary policy responds to broad inflation and activity.
data_quality_limitations: Policy is endogenous, not a pure energy variable.

exact_definition: Net share of banks tightening C&I loan standards.
source: Federal Reserve SLOOS via FRED DRTSCILM
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Bank capital, defaults, regulation, monetary policy.
data_quality_limitations: Survey series is quarterly and can be revised.

exact_definition: YoY growth in USD-converted U.S., euro-area, China and Japan M2.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: FX conversion and jurisdiction-specific money definitions.
data_quality_limitations: Proxy rather than harmonized global liquidity.

exact_definition: Federal Reserve industrial production index and YoY growth.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Interest rates, inventories, exports, technology cycles.
data_quality_limitations: Revised and not a direct energy-causality measure.

exact_definition: Industrial production index for manufacturing and YoY growth.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Trade, inventory cycles, strikes, sector composition.
data_quality_limitations: Revised and excludes services.

exact_definition: Real personal consumption expenditures and YoY growth.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Income, wealth, credit, fiscal policy, demographics.
data_quality_limitations: Aggregate and revised; services can offset goods weakness.

exact_definition: Real private nonresidential fixed investment and YoY growth.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Rates, taxes, technology, expected demand, policy.
data_quality_limitations: Quarterly and heavily revised.

exact_definition: YoY growth in real gross domestic product.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Broad demand, policy, productivity, trade, inventories.
data_quality_limitations: Quarterly, revised, and not a real-time vintage.

exact_definition: Nonfarm business output per hour and YoY growth.
revisions: Revised by source; latest-vintage data are not real-time vintages.
alternative_explanations: Technology, labour hoarding, composition, capital deepening.

exact_definition: Average weekly hours of production and nonsupervisory manufacturing employees.

exact_definition: Usually full-time employed divided by total civilian employment.

alternative_explanations: Demographics, education, preferences, sector mix.
data_quality_limitations: Ratio of independently seasonally adjusted series.

exact_definition: Part-time for economic reasons divided by total civilian employment.

exact_definition: Employment-population ratio for ages 25-54.
